title: Critical Vulnerability Detected
description: Fires when the vulnerability correlation finds critical-severity CVEs or CISA KEV entries in installed software. This indicates the device has software with known, actively exploited vulnerabilities.
author: Autopilot Monitor
explanation: The device has installed software with critical vulnerabilities. Software with CVEs rated CRITICAL (CVSS >= 9.0) or listed in the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog was detected. These vulnerabilities are actively targeted by attackers and should be remediated immediately.

remediation.title: Review vulnerability findings
steps: Open the Vulnerability Report section in the session detail
Identify all software with critical or KEV-flagged vulnerabilities
Check if newer versions are available that address these CVEs
Update the affected software in your Intune app deployment

remediation.title: Update deployment packages
steps: Check Intune for outdated app package versions
Update the deployment package to the latest patched version
